title: She Got Game
original_title: She Got Game: A Video Game Documentary
overview: This quirky and dynamic documentary features interviews with corporate and indie developers, as well as hardcore and casual gamers. We'll also lead you behind the scenes of major events to uncover some of the mysteries surrounding the hardcore fan scene.
